query:
WITH 3 as active_days
MATCH p = (u:User)-[e:HasUserProfile]-(c:Computer)
WHERE e.profileModified > (datetime().epochseconds - (active_days * 86400))
RETURN p
name: Profilehound - Active User Profile within last 3 days
description: Checks for all user profiles with a modified time within the last 3 days

query:
match p = (u:User)-[e:HasUserProfile]-(c:Computer)
where e.profileCreated < e.profileModified
return p
name: Profilehound - Active User Profile
description: Modified date is after created date, indicating this is likely an active profile

query:
WITH 3 as active_days, "administrators" as group_name
MATCH p = (g:Group)<-[:MemberOf*1..]-(u:User)-[e:HasUserProfile]-(c:Computer)
WHERE e.profileModified > (datetime().epochseconds - (active_days * 86400)) AND toLower(g.samaccountname) = group_name
RETURN p
name: Profilehound - Active User Profiles within a Specific Group
description: Finds all active user profiles within the last 3 days for members of a specific group.

name: Profilehound - All User Profiles
description: Checks for all user profiles found with Profilehound

name: Profilehound - Find user profiles by group name
description: Finds all profiles on machines for users within a specific group
